chapter_title: Licenses Issued by California Highway Patrol
text: Upon the effective date of any order of suspension or revocation of any license governed by this chapter, the licensee shall surrender the license to the commissioner.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2.5. Licenses Issued by California Highway Patrol [2500 - 2574]
#### Article 5. Denial, Suspension and Revocation [2540 - 2549]
##### § 2545

Upon the effective date of any order of suspension or revocation of any license governed by this chapter, the licensee shall surrender the license to the commissioner.

*(Added by Stats. 1968, Ch. 1309.)*

subsections.text: Upon the effective date of any order of suspension or revocation of any license governed by this chapter, the licensee shall surrender the license to the commissioner.
